entities.name: Synthesis
entities.context: Primary cognitive approach for structuring scattered insights into clear narratives with actionable outputs

entities.name: MECE Framework
entities.context: Framework applied within synthesis work (Mutually Exclusive, Collectively Exhaustive)

entities.name: Pattern Recognition
entities.context: Technique used within synthesis to identify recurring themes

entities.name: Exploration
entities.context: Secondary cognitive approach focused on generative ideation and possibility expansion

entities.name: Generative Ideation
entities.context: Creative technique within exploration for generating new ideas

entities.name: Connection Making
entities.context: Technique within exploration for linking disparate concepts

relationships.context: MECE framework is applied as part of synthesis work
Pattern recognition is a core technique within synthesis
Generative ideation is a technique within exploration
Connection making is a technique within exploration
Complementary cognitive modes - synthesis as primary, exploration as secondary
